name: message-inbox-row
title: Message Inbox Row
description: One row in a secure-message / results inbox — sender avatar, subject + preview, an unread dot, priority and category chips, an attachment Tooltip, and a timestamp.
clinicalNotes: In a clinical inbox, priority routing is a safety feature — urgent (e.g. critical results) uses the destructive tone and pulses (motion-safe), high uses warning; normal is unbadged to keep the list quiet. Unread state is doubled: a leading dot plus heavier type and a fuller background, never weight alone. Category and attachment carry Tooltips rather than relying on iconography alone, and the category chip hides below sm to protect the layout on phones.
notes: Layer-M1 atom. Feeds MessagesInboxPanel (M2), the Provider and Consumer blocks.
